inputs.label: Projected Revenue at Exit
inputs.businessContext: The projected annual revenue of the startup at the time of exit (e.g., 5 years from now).

inputs.label: Net Profit Margin
inputs.businessContext: Expected net profit margin at exit, expressed as a percentage.

inputs.label: P/E Ratio
inputs.businessContext: Price-to-earnings ratio typical for comparable public companies in the sector.

inputs.label: Required ROI
inputs.businessContext: Target return multiple for the investor (e.g., 3x means the investor aims to triple their investment).

inputs.label: Investment Amount
inputs.businessContext: The amount of capital being invested in the startup.
